action.reasoning: Observation: Latest ensemble (best.pt + last.pt, 20 TTA views, no rotations) achieved 0.8158 average accuracy, a new best. With 33 min remaining and only 3 iterations, further training is impossible. Analysis: Improved test-time augmentation can still yield gains. Adding D4 symmetries + random rotations (±15°) and increasing view count to 30 should slightly boost accuracy; previous TTA gave +1.0% over no TTA. The increased inference time is manageable. Decision: Rewrite predict.py with 30 TTA views (D4 + rotations + crops) and ensemble best.pt+last.pt; submit eval to squeeze out last fraction of performance.
